The '''''Hornclaw''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] which was stolen from [[Abek's Station]] by the [[Kerestian/Legends|Kerestian]] [[Limna Yith]].
